title: evolvulus alsinoides var. debilis
intro: Evolvulus alsinoides var. debilis, also known as Dwarf Blue Daze, is a low-growing, spreading perennial herb native to Mexico and Central America. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Evolvulus alsinoides var. debilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and act as an antioxidant, making it a potential remedy for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Evolvulus alsinoides var. debilis can be prepared for herbal use in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
